title: ch06-01-defining-an-enum

lay: How can I make a new list to hold numbers in my program?

lay: How do I make my program stop immediately when it runs into a serious problem instead of trying to clean up first?

lay: How do I get my minigrep program to read the words and file name I type when I run it?

lay: What’s the difference between regular ways to access data and these special types that can do more?
